first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as a strong senior individual contributor who completely lacks the required people-management experience for the role. The minor differences in phrasing and the organization of strengths and concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any new judgment based on the location change.
